title: International award for outstanding student mentor June Lin
description: The Duke Kunshan student was singled out from applicants worldwide for the annual award presented by the College Reading and Learning Association.
text:
International award for outstanding student mentor June Lin
The Duke Kunshan student was singled out from applicants worldwide for the annual award presented by the College Reading and Learning Association.
